title: bupleurum nodiflorum subsp. nanum
intro: Bupleurum nodiflorum subsp. nanum, also known as the dwarf or small-stemmed Chinese thoroughwort, is a plant species in the family Apiaceae, native to China. It has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiviral effects. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever, alleviating rheumatism and arthritis, and protecting against respiratory infections. Bupleurum nodiflorum subsp. nanum can be prepared as a decoction, tea, or powder, and is often used in combination with other herbs in traditional Chinese medicine.
